description: Wind is a perfect riding shoe designed by fila to ensure the best of comfot for your feet. With a polished upper and highly tractioned outsole, this shoe promises to be your companion during adventures. Upper Synthetic leather upper for heavy structure Perforated toe box and midfoot area for great breathability Central lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Heavily padded collar and plush tongue for snug comfort Brand name embossed on the side of the heel cup for style Midsole Soft, cushioned footbed for all-day in-step comfort PU midsole for light weight comfort and shock-absorption Removable sockliner to support an orthotic Outsole Made of durable rubber in herringbone pattern for great traction Added rubber counter below the heel and midfoot region for excellent grip Shoe careDo not machine washWipe with damp, clean cloth to remove dustStore away from sunlight
